qualities-catalog.description: Catalog of negative qualities from Run Faster

rows.name: Albinism
rows.description: Partial/complete lack of pigmentation. Weak Glare in indoor/overcast lighting; Moderate Glare on sunny days. All other Glare modifiers increased by one level. Halved sunburn resistance test duration. 4 Karma if character has cybereyes.
rows.restrictions: Cybereyes reduce to 4 Karma. Must buy down immediately if cybereyes gained during play.

rows.name: Amnesia (Surface Loss)
rows.description: Classic amnesia. Retains skills/abilities but no memory of identity or past. Knowledge skills absent; 2 Karma to access existing Knowledge skill, normal cost for new ones.

rows.name: Amnesia (Neural Deletion)
rows.description: Extreme memory loss. Physical Attributes, skills, qualities, Edge all start as mysteries. Requires GM collaboration for character creation.
rows.restrictions: Requires GM approval and collaboration. Character creation is largely GM-controlled.

rows.name: Asthma
rows.description: Chronic asthma. Additional/more rapid Fatigue effects. Faces Fatigue damage twice as often. Cumulative effects: 1 box=-1 Physical Actions/Social Limit; 2 boxes=-1 all Actions/Social Limit; 4 boxes=Fatigue resisted with Willpower only; 8 boxes=-1 all Actions/Social Limit.

rows.name: Bi-Polar
rows.description: Mental state fluctuates. GM rolls 1d6: 1-2=manic (+1 AGI/REA, -2 LOG/INT), 3-4=depressed (-2 AGI/REA/LOG/INT), 5-6=stable. Medication: 500 nuyen/month with SIN.
rows.restrictions: Requires prescription and SIN for medication.

rows.name: Big Regret
rows.description: Dark secret from past. Social Limit -3 against anyone who knows. Cannot buy off until secret becomes public; then +1 Notoriety and must buy off ASAP.
rows.restrictions: Cannot buy off until secret is public.

rows.name: Blind
rows.description: Completely blind. Auto-fail vision Perception. -4 general Perception, -3 Surprise Tests. Blind Fire in Ranged, Total Darkness in Melee. Cannot use cybereyes. Awakened with astral perception: -2 all physical plane actions.
rows.restrictions: Cannot use cybereyes. 5 Karma cost only for characters with Astral Sight access.

rows.name: Borrowed Time
rows.description: Fatal condition. Each session GM secretly rolls 3d6; three of a kind = character dies at dramatic moment. Cannot be bought off. Character can survive by burning ALL current Edge.
rows.restrictions: Cannot be bought off with Karma. Only Edge burn removes it.

rows.name: Computer Illiterate
rows.description: -4 dice pool modifier to all tests involving computers, electronic devices, or Matrix-connected systems. GM may require Success Tests for basic tasks during stress.

rows.name: Creature of Comfort
rows.description: Accustomed to a Lifestyle level (10=Middle, 17=High, 25=Luxury). -1 to all Social and Healing tests per Lifestyle category below chosen level for every day spent slumming.

rows.name: Day Job
rows.description: Regular job. 5 Karma=1,000 nuyen/10 hrs/wk; 10 Karma=2,500 nuyen/20 hrs/wk; 15 Karma=5,000 nuyen/40 hrs/wk. Missing work: first=warning, second=fired (-2 Street Cred, lose month salary).
rows.restrictions: Requires valid SIN (SINner quality or Rating 4+ fake SIN).

rows.name: Deaf
rows.description: Completely deaf. Auto-fail audio Perception. -2 general Perception, -3 Surprise Tests. Other modifiers at GM discretion.

rows.name: Did You Just Call Me Dumb?
rows.description: Character camouflages insults in speech. Any Glitch on any Social test always counts as a Critical Glitch.

rows.name: Dimmer Bulb
rows.description: -1 dice pool modifier per level on all tests involving Logic or Intuition.

rows.name: Driven
rows.description: Obsessive quest. Willpower + Logic (4) Test when faced with clue/opportunity or must drop everything to pursue it. +1 Willpower while actively working a lead.

rows.name: Emotional Attachment
rows.description: Irrational attachment to specific gear. Will always use it; risks life to retrieve if lost. If irretrievably lost: spend Karma to buy off OR -1 penalty to relevant tests for 6 months, then transfers to new item.

rows.name: Ex-Con
rows.description: Fresh out of prison on parole. Criminal record with police/prison corp. Must check in with PO 2x/week Matrix + 1x/week in person. No Restricted/Forbidden augmentations. Street contacts OK; Corp contacts need Loyalty 4+; Law enforcement need Loyalty 5-6.
rows.restrictions: Cannot be bought off; must be replaced with equal/greater negative qualities.

rows.name: Flashbacks
rows.description: Vivid hallucinations triggered by specific stimulus. Composure (5) Test or incapacitated for (5 - hits) Combat Turns. 7 Karma=once every other run; 15 Karma=at least once per session.
rows.restrictions: Stimulus determined with GM during character creation.

rows.name: Hobo with a Shotgun
rows.description: Will not stay above Squatter lifestyle. If forced above Squatter: -2 to all Mental attributes until spending a day in Squatter/Street lifestyle.

rows.name: Hung Out to Dry
rows.description: Contacts have stopped responding; character is a social pariah for unknown reason. GM knows the cause. Must buy off or replace with equal negative quality once resolved.
rows.restrictions: Must be bought off or replaced when situation is resolved.

rows.name: Illiterate
rows.description: Cannot read. Social Limit -1. -2 dice pool modifier with computer/commlink systems. Cannot choose reading-dependent Knowledge skills at creation. Reading-dependent Knowledge skills cost double Karma during play.

rows.name: In Debt
rows.description: Owes money. 5,000 nuyen per Karma point during character creation (max 75,000 nuyen). Debt = borrowed + 50%, +10%/month compound. Missing payment: 1 box Physical per 20,000 nuyen owed (unresistable, unhealable until paid).

rows.name: Incomplete Deprogramming
rows.description: Former deep-cover agent. Stress triggers Composure (4) Test or cover identity takes control for 1D6 minutes. Loses runner skills during episodes. Can trigger multiple times per encounter.

rows.name: Infirm
rows.description: Diminished physical fitness. Per 5 Karma: all Physical Attribute maximums drop by 1. Max 5 times. No Attribute maximum below 1. Cannot exceed modified maximum by any source.
rows.restrictions: Stacks with Aged (Bullets & Bandages p. 12). No Attribute maximum below 1.

rows.name: Liar
rows.description: -1 dice pool modifier to all Social skill tests. GM rolls 1D6 when addressing someone: on 1, target assumes character is lying. Repeat offense with same NPC: go wrong on 1-2. Third offense: +1 Notoriety, -1 Loyalty (0 Loyalty = contact lost).

rows.name: Night Blindness
rows.description: Natural vision doesn't adjust to poor lighting. All Light/Glare Environmental modifiers one category worse (except Full Light/No Glare).
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with any quality affecting eyes. Must buy off if corrective cyber/bioware installed.

rows.name: Oblivious
rows.description: 6 Karma: -2 dice pool modifier to all Perception Tests (standard, Astral, Matrix). 10 Karma: all Perception Test thresholds increased by 1.

rows.name: Pacifist
rows.description: 10 Karma: avoids violence except self-defense (after clear attack). Non-lethal still counts as violent. 15 Karma: no violence ever. Violence causes -1 Mental tests until Charisma+Willpower (20, 1 day) Extended Test. Failure in 7 days: lose 1 WIL or CHA (permanent). Killing: -2 modifier, 1 week interval, Mental Limit -1.

rows.name: Paranoia
rows.description: -2 dice pool modifier on all Social Tests with contacts Loyalty <4 or unfamiliar persons. Refuses to share address/location. Must change living spaces every few months.

rows.name: Paraplegic
rows.description: Paralyzed from waist down. Wheelchair locomotion: walk=AGI x 3, run=AGI x 4. Trouble with stairs/curbs. Lifestyle +10% cost. Vehicles +5% or need Rigger Interface for DNI. No effect on astral/Matrix.

rows.name: Phobia
rows.description: Visceral fear of specific stimulus. Cost = Frequency (Uncommon 2, Common 5) + Severity (Mild 3: -1 all; Moderate 5: -3 all + Composure (2) or flee; Severe 10: -6 all + Composure (5) or flee (5-hits) turns).

rows.name: Pie Iesu Domine. Dona Eis Requiem.
rows.description: Flagellant. Gains High Pain Tolerance 1. Always starts day with 1 box Physical damage. Seeks to re-inflict damage if healed.

rows.name: Poor Self Control (Braggart)
rows.description: Must top others' claims. Composure (3) to resist. May be ignored, considered infantile, or challenged to prove claims.
rows.restrictions: Can take multiple Poor Self Control sub-types (once each).

rows.name: Poor Self Control (Thrill-Seeker)
rows.description: Always takes most dangerous option. Composure (2) to resist. Payoff: +1 Initiative Score for 5 Combat Turns.
rows.restrictions: Can take multiple Poor Self Control sub-types (once each).

rows.name: Poor Self Control (Compulsive)
rows.description: Must exert order. Composure (2) to resist. Base = 2 x Composure threshold (1-4); +2 personal environment, +3 single public aspect, +4 broad public environment.
rows.restrictions: Can take multiple Poor Self Control sub-types (once each).

rows.name: Poor Self Control (Vindictive)
rows.description: Must consider escalation/retaliation. Composure (2) to resist instant payback. Even when resisted, must add offender to hit list.
rows.restrictions: Can take multiple Poor Self Control sub-types (once each).

rows.name: Poor Self Control (Combat Monster)
rows.description: Loses self-control in combat. Fights until all opponents disabled. Composure (3) to break off fight.
rows.restrictions: Can take multiple Poor Self Control sub-types (once each).

rows.name: Records on File
rows.description: Big 10 megacorp has records. +2 dice pool modifier for megacorp agents to identify character. +2 to track/locate in C+ security areas.

rows.name: Reduced (Smell)
rows.description: -2 dice pool modifier to tests involving smell. Cumulative with other Reduced senses for general Perception.
rows.restrictions: Cannot have Reduced and corresponding total loss (Blind/Deaf) simultaneously.

rows.name: Reduced (Taste)
rows.description: -2 dice pool modifier to tests involving taste. Cumulative with other Reduced senses for general Perception.
rows.restrictions: Cannot have Reduced and corresponding total loss (Blind/Deaf) simultaneously.

rows.name: Reduced (Hearing)
rows.description: -2 dice pool modifier to tests involving hearing. Cumulative with other Reduced senses for general Perception.
rows.restrictions: Cannot have Reduced (Hearing) and Deaf at the same time.

rows.name: Reduced (Sight)
rows.description: -2 dice pool modifier to tests involving sight. Cumulative with other Reduced senses for general Perception.
rows.restrictions: Cannot have Reduced (Sight) and Blind at the same time.

rows.name: Reduced (Astral Sight)
rows.description: -2 dice pool modifier to tests involving astral sight. Cumulative with other Reduced senses for general Perception.
rows.restrictions: Awakened characters only (6 Karma per book text for certain Awakened).

rows.name: Reduced (Touch)
rows.description: -2 dice pool modifier to tests involving touch. Affects most Physical skill rolls due to lack of tactile sensitivity.

rows.name: Sensory Overload Syndrome
rows.description: Epileptic-like episodes in high ARO saturation areas. Willpower + Edge (4) Test or seizure for (5 - hits) minutes. Preventable by deactivating enhancements/commlink or hidden mode.

rows.name: Signature
rows.description: Must leave calling card at every job. Tests to identify/track character get dice pool modifier = Street Cred + Public Awareness.

rows.name: Vendetta
rows.description: Blood feud with individual or group. Composure (3) when encountering target or must incite violent confrontation. If nemesis neutralized: buy off or new nemesis assigned.

rows.name: Wanted
rows.description: Bounty/contract on character worth 25,000+ nuyen. Must deal with bounty hunters frequently. If bounty cleared, must buy off with Karma.

asthma-effects.description: Cumulative effects of Asthma quality based on Fatigue damage boxes

rows.effects: Wheezing; -1 dice pool modifier to all Physical Actions; Social Limit decreased by 1
Shortness of breath; -1 dice pool modifier to all Actions; Social Limit decreased by 1 additional point
Chest tightness; further Fatigue damage resisted with only Willpower
Wracking cough; -1 dice pool modifier to all Actions; Social Limit decreased by 1 additional point

day-job.description: Day Job quality tiers showing Karma, salary, and hours

phobia-frequency.description: Phobia frequency component of Karma cost

rows.description: Triggering condition is relatively rare (e.g., smell of roses, specific insects)
Triggering condition is commonly encountered (e.g., sunlight, trolls, insects, magic, outdoors, crowds)

phobia-severity.description: Phobia severity component of Karma cost and mechanical effects

rows.effects: -1 dice pool modifier to all actions
-3 dice pool modifier to all actions; Composure (2) Test or must get away from source
-6 dice pool modifier; Composure (5) Test or must flee for (5 - hits) Combat Turns
